headline: Pfizer (PFE) Wins FDA Approval For IBRANCE In HER2 Positive Breast Cancer
summary: Pfizer's IBRANCE has received new FDA approval as the first CDK4/6 inhibitor maintenance therapy for HR+, HER2+ metastatic breast cancer after induction treatment. The approval covers use of IBRANCE in combination with trastuzumab and endocrine therapy for patients with this subtype of breast cancer. The decision is based on results from the Phase 3 PATINA trial. For investors watching Pfizer (NYSE:PFE), this approval adds a fresh clinical milestone to a stock that has faced pressure in...
